name: Arlington State Bank
description_short: Arlington State Bank is a locally-owned community bank in Arlington, Minnesota, offering traditional banking services combined with modern online and mobile banking technology.
description_long: Arlington State Bank was chartered in 1895 and operates as a fourth-generation family bank in Arlington, Minnesota, located in Sibley County within an hour of the Minneapolis metro area. The bank is locally-owned and operated by Arlington taxpayers with a stated commitment to community economic growth. The institution positions itself at the intersection of traditional hometown banking service and 21st-century financial technology. Arlington State Bank offers a range of deposit and loan products designed to serve customers through different life stages and financial seasons. Their service suite includes online and mobile banking options, multiple savings and investment calculators, mortgage and loan calculators, and comprehensive fee schedules for transparency. The bank emphasizes personalized attention and customer service as core differentiators in a competitive financial landscape. What sets Arlington State Bank apart is its deep community roots, fourth-generation family ownership, and explicit focus on balancing traditional relationship banking with digital convenience. They provide multiple calculator tools to help customers make informed decisions about mortgages, loans, and savings strategies. The bank maintains FDIC insurance coverage for transaction accounts and publishes clear privacy policies and terms. For consumers seeking a traditional community bank experience with modern digital capabilities in the rural Minnesota area, Arlington State Bank represents a locally-controlled alternative to larger regional or national institutions. The bank's lack of detailed product information on their website may require direct contact for comprehensive understanding of rates, terms, and specific offerings. Their focus on community ties and personalized service appeals to customers who value relationship banking over purely digital-first institutions. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking account setup and management
pros: Fourth-generation family-owned and locally-operated bank with 130+ years of history dating to 1895 charter
FDIC insurance coverage for transaction accounts providing deposit protection
Offers both online and mobile banking platforms for digital convenience
Multiple financial calculators available for mortgages, loans, and savings planning
Emphasizes personalized attention and hometown service approach
Located in Sibley County with proximity to Minneapolis metro area
Transparent fee schedule and published privacy policies available on website
cons: Website lacks specific information about interest rates, loan terms, or product details requiring customers to call or email for quotes
Limited geographic accessibility as a single-location community bank in rural Minnesota
Minimal product detail on website makes it difficult to compare offerings with larger competitors without direct contact
No information about minimum deposit requirements, account types, or specific loan programs beyond calculator availability
Website design and structure appears outdated compared to modern banking interfaces
best_for: Sibley County and Arlington, Minnesota residents seeking community bank relationships
Rural customers who value personalized service and local decision-making over national chains
Small business owners and farmers in the agricultural region seeking relationship banking
diagnosis: Arlington State Bank is best for residents in the Arlington, Minnesota area and surrounding Sibley County who prioritize relationship banking, community investment, and personalized service over digital-first convenience. The primary caveat is limited product information available online—prospective customers must contact the bank directly via phone (507-964-2256) or email (wecare@arlingtonstatebank.com) to obtain specific rates, terms, and detailed product comparisons.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Arlington State Bank in Minnesota offers traditional banking with modern online services.
